title: elymus multiflorus var. kingianus
intro: Elymus multiflorus var. kingianus, also known as King's Wildrye, is a type of perennial grass native to China and the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus multiflorus var. kingianus are said to include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
